x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Do simple changes to OCI images

commands.name: login
commands.description: Run 'nibbler [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information.

options.name: --from-image
options.description: Set from image (required)

options.name: --from-insecure
options.description: Insecure from registry (http)

options.name: --from-skip-tls-verify
options.description: Skip verifying from registry TLS certificate

options.name: --from-username
options.description: From registry username

options.name: --from-password
options.description: From registry password

options.name: --to-image
options.description: To image (required)

options.name: --to-insecure
options.description: Insecure to registry (http)

options.name: --to-skip-tls-verify
options.description: Skip verifying to registry TLS certificate

options.name: --to-username
options.description: To registry username

options.name: --to-password
options.description: To registry password

options.name: --from-file
options.description: Read from image from file (alternative to

options.name: --to-file
options.description: Write image to file (alternative to --to-image)

options.name: --to-images
options.description:
Comma separated target images. Use docker config file
for authentication, does not support insecure.
(alternative to --to-image)

options.name: --add
options.description:
Add contents of a folder to the image
'sourceFolder:destFolder[:ownerId:groupId:permissions]'

options.name: --addFolder
options.description:
Add a folder to the image
'destFolder[:ownerId:groupId:permissions]'

options.name: --non-reproducible
options.description: Don't produce a reproducible image

options.name: --ignore-file
options.description:
Use ignore file, optionally specify file (default:
'.dockerignore')

options.name: --label
options.description: Add label to the image 'name=value'

options.name: --labels
options.description:
Comma separated labels to the image
'name=value,name=value'

options.name: --env
options.description: Add a environment variable to the image 'name=value'

options.name: --git-labels
options.description:
Add common git labels to image, optionally define the
path to the git repo.

options.name: --git-labels-prefix
options.description:
Specify the prefix of the git labels. (default:
'nibbler.git')

options.name: --workdir
options.description: Set the working directory in the image

options.name: --user
options.description: Set the user in the image

options.name: --cmd
options.description: Set the image cmd

options.name: --entrypoint
options.description: Set the image entrypoint

options.name: --debug
options.description: Verbose output

options.name: --trace
options.description: Trace log. INSECURE! Exposes authentication headers

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Does not push, only shows what would happen (use with

options.name: --docker-config
options.description:
Specify docker config file for authentication with
registry. (default: ~/.docker/config.json)

options.name: --insecure
options.description:
Insecure registry (http). Only use if base image and
destination is the same registry.

options.name: --skip-tls-verify
options.description:
Skip verifying registry TLS certificate. Only use if
base image and destination is the same registry.

options.name: --temp-folder
options.description: Set temp folder (default: ./.nibbler)

options.name: --digest-file
options.description: Output image digest to file, optionally specify file
